---
title: "Progress Report n°1"
author: "Jean-Christophe Loiseau"
date: "June 2023"
image: "../imgs/progress_bar.png"
number-sections: true
bibliography: bibliography.bib
license: "CC BY"
---

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/buttons/88x31/png/by.png" width="15%" />

This is the first progress report for the ANR project **BENEFIT**, covering the period from January 1st, 2026 to June 30th, 2026.

## Identification

| | |
|---|---|
| **Project acronym** | **BENEFIT** |
| **Project title** | ??? |
| **Funding program** | ??? |
| **Agreement number** | ANR-??-????-???? |
| **Principal Investigator** | [Lionel Larchêque](mailto:jean-christophe.loiseau@ensam.eu) |
| **Starting date** | ??/??/202? |
| **Duration** | 48 months |

| | |
|---|---|
| **Author of report** | [Jean-Christophe Loiseau](mailto:jean-christophe.loiseau@ensam.eu) |
| **Date** | June 2023 |
| **Period covered** | 01/01/2023 - 30/06/2023 |

## Progress Report


## Bibliography {.unnumbered}
